entries.name: cf-binding
entries.intent: Add a binding (D1, KV, R2, Vectorize, Hyperdrive, AI, queue) end-to-end with config + types + usage

entries.name: cf-deploy
entries.intent: Deploy a Worker with versioned uploads, secrets, and gradual rollouts via Wrangler 4

entries.name: cf-dev
entries.intent: Run Wrangler dev with Miniflare 4 local D1, KV, R2, Vectorize simulators

entries.name: cf-durable-object
entries.intent: Create a Durable Object class with migration, binding, alarm pattern, and unit tests

entries.name: cf-scaffold
entries.intent: Bootstrap a new Cloudflare Worker (or a whole pnpm-workspaces monorepo) with shared packages and bindings

entries.name: cf-secret
entries.intent: Manage Cloudflare Worker secrets per-environment with wrangler secret put / bulk
